2605.10129.title: Synthetic Pre-Pre-Training Improves Language Model Robustness to Noisy Pre-Training Data
2605.10129.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) rely on web-scale corpora for pre-training. The noise inherent in these datasets tends to obscure meaningful patterns and ultimately degrade model performance. Data curation mitigates but cannot eliminate such noise, so pre-training corpora remain noisy in practice. We therefore study whether a lightweight pre-pre-training (PPT) stage based on synthetic data with learnable temporal structure helps resist noisy data during the pre-training (PT) stage. Across various corruption settings, our method consistently improves robustness to noise during PT, with larger relative gains at higher noise levels. For a 1B-parameter model, a synthetic PPT stage with only 65M tokens achieves the same final loss as the baseline while using up to 49\% fewer natural-text PT tokens across different noise levels. Mechanistic analyses suggest PPT does not immediately suppress attention to noisy tokens. Rather, PPT-initialized models gradually downweight attention between corrupted tokens during noisy PT. This indicates that synthetic PPT inhibits noise self-modeling and shapes the subsequent optimization trajectory. Code is available at https://github.com/guox18/formal-language-prepretraining.
2605.10129.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）依賴於網絡規模的語料庫進行預訓練。這些數據集固有的噪聲往往會掩蓋有意義的模式，最終降低模型性能。數據策劃可以減輕但無法消除這種噪聲，因此預訓練語料在實踐中仍然是嘈雜的。因此，我們研究基於具有可學習時間結構的合成數據的輕量級預預訓練（PPT）階段是否有助於抵抗預訓練（PT）階段中的噪聲數據。在各種損壞設置下，我們的方法在PT期間始終提高對噪聲的穩健性，並在較高噪聲水平下獲得更大的相對增益。對於一個擁有10億參數的模型，僅使用6500萬個標記的合成PPT階段在不同噪聲水平下達到了與基線相同的最終損失，同時使用的自然文本PT標記最多減少了49\%。機械分析表明，PPT並不會立即抑制對噪聲標記的注意。相反，PPT初始化的模型在嘈雜的PT期間逐漸降低對損壞標記之間的注意力。這表明合成PPT抑制了噪聲自建模並塑造了後續的優化軌跡。代碼可在 https://github.com/guox18/formal-language-prepretraining 獲得。
2605.10129.author: Xu Guo et.al.
2605.10129.authors: Xu Guo, Runyu Peng, Jian Tong, Yunhua Zhou, Haijun Lv, Zhihui Lu, Qipeng Guo
